# helpers


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

## State Getters

These extract verify state from the nested `step_states.verify` path in
the interaction context. The verify step reads the document_id that was
set by the review step after committing to the graph.

## Cross-Step Data Access

Verify step can also read document_id from the review step if it was set
there during commit (fallback for initial load).
